lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: Jonah son of Amittai, hear the word of the LORD.

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: Arise. Go to Nineveh, that great city, and call out against it, for its evil has come up before Him.

lines.speaker: Messenger
lines.text: The call has not changed. The LORD sent you east, but your heart is already turning west.

lines.speaker: Merchant
lines.text: Passage is dear today. Storm-rumors make sailors charge twice.

lines.speaker: Merchant
lines.text: My Tarshish manifest is waiting in the harbor office. Carry it to the sailor at the south pier, bring me his receipt, and I will cover your fare.

lines.speaker: Merchant
lines.text: That receipt will do. Here: a stamped fare token. Hand it to the dockmaster, and he will stop glaring at you.

lines.speaker: Merchant
lines.text: The sailor is waiting below with my manifest. No manifest, no token.

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: A manifest from the merchant? Good. Here is the receipt. Tell him the cargo is stowed, though not as tidy as he would wish.

lines.speaker: Sailor
lines.text: I have no more papers for you. If you are boarding, bring your courage with your fare.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: No token, no gangplank. The sea does not carry stowaways for free.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: You have the fare, but I will hear whether you even know the call you are running from.

lines.speaker: Dockmaster
lines.text: You know the command well enough. Strange thing to flee from a word you can repeat so clearly.

lines.speaker: Captain
lines.text: Tarshish-bound and in a hurry? Then board. We cast off before the tide turns.

lines.speaker: Sign
lines.text: Piers of Joppa. Eastbound caravans inland. Westbound ships at the long dock.
